entities.mention: Display Lots & Serial Numbers on Delivery Slips

relations.evidence: scroll down to the Traceability section
click the checkbox to enable the Lots & Serial Numbers feature
Once that feature is activated, a new option will appear to enable Expiration Dates

scroll down to the Traceability section

heading: Set expiration dates on receipts with lots & serial numbers

relations.evidence: Navigate to Inventory app --> Operations --> Receipts
From here, click the Details link located on the of the product line
The receipt cannot be validated without an assigned lot or serial number
The receipt cannot be validated without an assigned lot or serial number
In the pop-up, the Expiration Date automatically populates
Click the Lot/Serial Number field on the appropriate line
If the Dates field on the product form has not been configured
A oi-arrow-up Traceability smart button will appear upon validating the receipt
Click it to see the updated Traceability Report

heading: Set expiration dates on manufactured products

entities.name: Sell products with expiration dates
entities.mention: Selling perishable products with expiration dates

relations.evidence: Selling perishable products with expiration dates is done the same as any other type of product.
The first step in selling perishable products is to create a sales order.
go to Sales app --> New to create a new quotation
New to create a new quotation
fill out the information on the sales order form... Add a product to add the desired products to the Product lines
set a Quantity for the products
click Apply to confirm the date
click Confirm to confirm the sales order
Alert Date set on the product form
click the Delivery smart button at the top of the sales order
to see the warehouse receipt form
the Removal Strategy for the Location the products are stored in must be set
Removal strategies can also be set on Product Categories

heading: View expiration dates for lots & serial numbers

relations.evidence: click Group By, choose Add Custom Group
click the oi-settings-adjust icon, then tick the Expiration Date checkbox
Customers can also view the expiration date alert in their customer portal
Customers can also view the expiration date alert
the Dates tab lists all expiration information
Dates tab lists all expiration information
the form displays a red Expiration Alert
If the expiration date... has passed, the form displays a red Expiration Alert
click Filters, and choose Expiration Alerts
